Our facility has a Trade Mill Test (TMT) which is a stress test. This test illustrates how your heart functions when you exercise. It helps identify clogged arteries and direct heart patients' treatment regimens.
The Pulmonary Function Test (PFT) is another crucial service we provide. PFT is essential for patients with heart conditions that impact breathing
We are also experts in Stress ECHO
